name: desktop-control
tagline: ClawHub (377★): Advanced desktop automation with mouse, keyboard, and screen control
verdict: Serious defect: the frontmatter has no name field at all, just a description. Without a name, the skill may fail to register or load correctly, breaking things before it even runs. No versioning either. This needs fixing before use, not a minor nitpick.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in the file, despite the skill's scope (broad desktop automation) being plausible to misfire against adjacent
The full multi-function API reference (lines ~84-403) plus the exhaustive Key Names Reference table (lines ~406-450) are pasted inline in SKILL.md with no references/ split, despit
Frontmatter block (lines 1-3) contains only a `description` field; there is no `name` field at all, so the required non-empty name is absent.
